section.heading: Anhydrous ammonia

subsection.chapeau: It is unlawful for any person—

paragraph.content: to transport stolen anhydrous ammonia across State lines,

subsection.continuation: knowing, intending, or having reasonable cause to believe that such anhydrous ammonia will be used to manufacture a controlled substance in violation of this part.

subsection.content: Any person who violates subsection (a) shall be imprisoned or fined, or both, in accordance with section 843(d) of this title as if such violation were a violation of a provision of section 843 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 91–513, title II, § 423, as added Pub. L. 106–310, div. B, title XXXVI, § 3653(a), Oct. 17, 2000, 114 Stat. 1240.)
